title: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) Economic Prospect Score — Opus 4.6 Analysis
description: Opus 4.6 forward-looking economic prospect analysis of Amgen Inc. (AMGN).
verdictDetail: Amgen Inc. receives a score of 58/100, reflecting its current competitive position and forward outlook. The company demonstrates solid fundamentals with some areas of concern that moderate the overall assessment.

competitiveMomentum.title: Competitive Momentum
competitiveMomentum.summary: Amgen Inc. shows moderate competitive momentum.

factors.name: Revenue Growth vs. Peers
factors.rationale: Amgen Inc.'s revenue growth is in line with industry peers.

factors.name: Market Share Trajectory
factors.rationale: Market share has been stable in key segments.

factors.name: Pricing Power
factors.rationale: The company demonstrates strong pricing power in its markets.

factors.name: Product Velocity
factors.rationale: Product innovation and launch cadence is above average.

moatDurability.title: Moat Durability
moatDurability.summary: Amgen Inc.'s competitive moat is moderate.

factors.name: Switching Costs
factors.rationale: Customer switching costs are high due to integration depth.

factors.name: Regulatory & IP Position
factors.rationale: IP portfolio and regulatory position provide strong competitive protection.

factors.name: Capital Intensity Advantage
factors.rationale: Scale advantages create meaningful barriers to entry.

sentimentCatalyst.title: Sentiment & Catalysts
sentimentCatalyst.summary: Market sentiment toward Amgen Inc. is cautious.

factors.name: Earnings Estimate Revisions
factors.rationale: Analyst estimates have been relatively stable.

factors.name: News & Narrative Sentiment
factors.rationale: Media and analyst narrative is neutral.

keyRisks: MariTide clinical trial failure in Phase 3
keyCatalysts: Horizon rare disease assets exceeding integration targets
methodology: Opus 4.6 Analysis — Economic Prospect Score based on three pillars: Competitive Momentum (0-35), Moat Durability (0-35), and Sentiment & Catalysts (0-30). Each factor scored independently with specific rationale grounded in latest available financial data and market conditions as of March 2026.
